2026-04-30GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the United Arab Emirates for the Promotion and Protection of InvestmentsOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the United Arab Emirates for the Promotion and Protection of Investments done at Abu Dhabi on 20 November 2025.N/A
subject: Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the United Arab Emirates for the Promotion and Protection of Investments
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the United Arab Emirates for the Promotion and Protection of Investments done at Abu Dhabi on 20 November 2025.
